Next, the passage says that staying outside the resort can save a large amount of money if you plan to stay for a week or two. That matches with option B. So B is a possible correct answer. The passage also talks about buying food ahead of time and having meals at the hotel or cheaper restaurants instead of buying food inside Disney World.
